title: Grok16 belt — single fabric knowing, single-location reads
motto: One belt die — single fabric. Chunked redata. Wave-massive dispatch without monolithic blast or nested fields.

belt_1_0.rule: 1.0 baseline — Field-Opt throughput, no belt chunk scheduler

belt_2_0.rule: 2.0 belt — single fabric: chunked dispatch, OpenMP lanes, LTO+PGO-ready, Hostess gates, depth fields sealed and destroyed at consumers
